description: Comprehensive user profile page with account management, personalization, and Stripe-ready billing portal. Includes subscription tiers (Free/Premium), payment method management, and invoice history with stubbed endpoints for future Stripe integration.

userStories.title: Billing Database Models
userStories.description: As a developer, I need database models for subscriptions and billing so user tier data persists.
acceptanceCriteria: Add SubscriptionTier enum to schema: FREE, PREMIUM
Add SubscriptionStatus enum: ACTIVE, CANCELED, PAST_DUE
Add Subscription model: id, userId, tier, status, stripeSubscriptionId (nullable), stripeCustomerId (nullable), currentPeriodStart, currentPeriodEnd, createdAt, updatedAt
Add PaymentMethod model: id, userId, type, last4, brand, expiryMonth, expiryYear, isDefault, stripePaymentMethodId (nullable), createdAt
Add Invoice model: id, userId, subscriptionId, amount, currency, status (PAID|PENDING|FAILED), stripeInvoiceId (nullable), pdfUrl (nullable), periodStart, periodEnd, createdAt
Add tier field to User model with default FREE
Run npx prisma db push successfully
npm run typecheck passes

userStories.title: User Profile Fields
userStories.description: As a developer, I need additional user fields for profile features.
acceptanceCriteria: Add avatarUrl field to User model (nullable String)
Add bio field to User model (nullable String, max 500 chars)
Add preferences field to User model (Json, default {})
Run npx prisma db push successfully
npm run typecheck passes

userStories.title: Profile Page Layout
userStories.description: As a user, I want a profile page with clear sections so I can manage my account.
acceptanceCriteria: Create profile page at src/app/profile/page.tsx (protected route)
Sidebar navigation with sections: Profile, Preferences, Billing, Invoices
Active section highlighted in sidebar
URL updates with section query param (e.g., /profile?section=billing)
Mobile: horizontal tab navigation
Redirect to /signin if not authenticated
npm run typecheck passes

userStories.title: Profile Section - Basic Info
userStories.description: As a user, I want to view and edit my basic profile information.
acceptanceCriteria: Display current name and email
Avatar display with initials fallback if no image
Edit name with inline save using Server Action
Email shown as read-only with note: Contact support to change
Show account creation date formatted nicely
Show current subscription tier badge (Free gray / Premium gold)
npm run typecheck passes

userStories.title: Profile Section - Avatar Upload
userStories.description: As a user, I want to upload a profile picture so my account feels personalized.
acceptanceCriteria: Avatar upload button with file input
Accept jpg, png, webp up to 2MB
Preview image before save
Store in public/avatars/{userId}.{ext}
Update user.avatarUrl on successful upload
Fallback to initials avatar component if no upload
npm run typecheck passes

userStories.title: Profile Section - Change Password
userStories.description: As a user, I want to change my password from my profile.
acceptanceCriteria: Change password form: current password, new password, confirm password
Validate current password before allowing change
Password requirements: minimum 8 characters
Success toast message on completion
Error handling for incorrect current password
npm run typecheck passes

userStories.title: Preferences Section - Bio & Display
userStories.description: As a user, I want to set a bio and display preferences.
acceptanceCriteria: Bio textarea with character count (max 500)
Toggle for Show email publicly (stored in preferences JSON)
Save button with loading state
Success toast on save
npm run typecheck passes

userStories.title: Preferences Section - Notifications
userStories.description: As a user, I want to control what notifications I receive.
acceptanceCriteria: Email notification toggles: Newsletter updates, New content alerts, Account activity
Store settings in user preferences JSON field
Changes save immediately with toast confirmation
npm run typecheck passes

userStories.title: Billing Service Layer
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a service layer that abstracts billing operations for easy Stripe integration later.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/billing/subscription-service.ts
Functions: createSubscription(), cancelSubscription(), getSubscription(), reactivateSubscription()
Create src/lib/billing/payment-service.ts
Functions: addPaymentMethod(), removePaymentMethod(), setDefaultPaymentMethod(), listPaymentMethods()
Create src/lib/billing/invoice-service.ts
Functions: listInvoices(), getInvoice()
Each function has // STRIPE_INTEGRATION_POINT comment marker
All functions work with database models (stubbed, no real Stripe)
npm run typecheck passes

userStories.title: Billing Section - Current Plan Display
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see my current subscription plan clearly.
acceptanceCriteria: Display current tier (Free or Premium) with visual card
Plan features comparison: Free (newsletters only) vs Premium (exclusive content + early access)
For Premium: show billing cycle dates and next billing amount ($9.99)
For Free: prominent Upgrade to Premium CTA button
npm run typecheck passes

userStories.title: Billing Section - Upgrade Flow
userStories.description: As a Free user, I want to upgrade to Premium.
acceptanceCriteria: Upgrade to Premium button opens pricing modal
Modal shows: Premium $9.99/month with feature list
Subscribe button calls stubbed createSubscription()
On success: update UI to show Premium tier, show success toast
Note in modal: Payment processing coming soon
npm run typecheck passes

userStories.title: Billing Section - Cancel Flow
userStories.description: As a Premium user, I want to cancel my subscription.
acceptanceCriteria: Manage Plan dropdown for Premium users with Cancel subscription option
Cancel shows confirmation modal with end date message
Confirm calls stubbed cancelSubscription()
Subscription status changes to CANCELED
Show Your access continues until {periodEnd} message
npm run typecheck passes

userStories.title: Billing Section - Payment Methods
userStories.description: As a user, I want to manage my payment methods.
acceptanceCriteria: List saved payment methods with last4, brand icon, expiry
Default badge on primary payment method
Add payment method button opens modal with card form fields
Add Card calls stubbed addPaymentMethod(), creates mock card
Remove button on non-default cards with confirmation
Set as default option on each card
Empty state: No payment methods yet with add CTA
Info banner: Payment processing will be available soon
npm run typecheck passes

userStories.title: Invoices Section - History
userStories.description: As a user, I want to view my billing history.
acceptanceCriteria: Table of invoices: date, description, amount, status, actions
Status badges: Paid (green), Pending (yellow), Failed (red)
Download PDF button shows toast: PDF generation coming soon
Pagination if more than 10 invoices
For Free users: No invoices message with upgrade CTA
npm run typecheck passes

userStories.title: Billing API Endpoints
userStories.description: As a developer, I need API endpoints for billing operations.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/billing/subscribe - creates subscription via service
POST /api/billing/cancel - cancels subscription via service
GET /api/billing/payment-methods - lists payment methods
POST /api/billing/payment-methods - adds payment method
DELETE /api/billing/payment-methods/[id] - removes payment method
PATCH /api/billing/payment-methods/[id]/default - sets default
GET /api/billing/invoices - lists invoices with pagination
All endpoints require authentication
npm run typecheck passes

userStories.title: Tier Access Control
userStories.description: As a developer, I need tier-based access control for content.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/auth/tier-guard.ts utility
Function: requirePremium() returns boolean for access check
Function: getUserTier(userId) returns current tier
Update /exclusive pages to check tier before showing content
Free users see content preview with Upgrade to access overlay
Premium users see full content
npm run typecheck passes

userStories.title: Profile Header Dropdown
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see my profile summary in navigation.
acceptanceCriteria: Create user dropdown component for header
Shows: avatar, name, tier badge
Dropdown menu items: Profile, Billing, Sign out
Links navigate correctly
npm run typecheck passes

userStories.title: Seed Mock Billing Data
userStories.description: As a developer, I need seed data for testing billing UI.
acceptanceCriteria: Create or update prisma/seed.ts
Create test user with Premium subscription
Add 2 mock payment methods (Visa ending 4242, Mastercard ending 5555)
Add 3 mock invoices with PAID status for past 3 months
Seed runs without errors: npx prisma db seed
npm run typecheck passes

nonGoals: No proration calculations for plan changes
